Home › Programmes › Certificate in Public Health Assistant
Certificate Programme

Certificate in
Public Health Assistant

The Public Health Assistant Certificate prepares students with foundational knowledge in disease prevention and control, alongside specialized training in fogging, water sampling, food sampling, and more. Modular programmes are also available for working adults. MQA Fully Accredited (R/213/4/0082) (MQA/FA4988).

18 Months (Full Time) Intake: Contact Admissions
Enrol Now

Accreditation

Code: CPHA MQA: MQA/FA4988 MOHE: R/213/4/0082 Local / Malaysian Only

Why Choose DIT?

  • ✓ Full scholarship & job placements from partner hospitals
  • ✓ MOHE & MQA accredited programmes
  • ✓ 30+ years affiliated with Damai Service Hospital

Advantages of Studying at DIT

MOHE & MQA Accredited — All programmes approved by Ministry of Higher Education
PTPTN Loans — Financial assistance available for eligible Malaysian students
Hostel Accommodation — Established condominiums with full facilities nearby
Job Placements — Scholarship partnerships with partner hospitals
Qualified Faculty — Registered lecturers and clinical instructors
30+ Years Excellence — Affiliated with Damai Service Hospital

Entry Requirements

Entry Requirements

Pass SPM with minimum 1 credit in any subject AND Pass in Bahasa Malaysia and Sejarah (History)
OR Pass Unified Examination Certificate (UEC) with minimum Grade B in 1 subject
OR Pass O-Level with minimum Grade C in 1 subject
OR Any other qualifications recognised by the Malaysian Government

About This Programme

The Public Health Assistant Certificate prepares students with foundational knowledge in disease prevention and control, alongside specialized training in fogging, water sampling, food sampling, and more. Modular programmes are also available for working adults. MQA Fully Accredited (R/213/4/0082) (MQA/FA4988).

Course Modules

1Semester 1

  • Fundamentals of Environmental Health Chemistry
  • Fundamentals of Environmental Health Physics
  • Statistics in Health
  • Anatomy and Physiology
  • Vector and Pest Control
  • Integrity and Anti-Corruption Course
  • Organizational Relations and Behavior
  • Environmental Health Microbiology
  • Water Supply and Wastewater Disposal

2Semester 2

  • Food Safety and Quality
  • Appreciation of Ethics and Civilization
  • Communicative English
  • Epidemiology and Disease Control
  • Public Health Legislation
  • Health Education
  • Urbanization and Integrated Solid Waste Management

3Semester 3

  • Basics of Entrepreneurship
  • Co-Curriculum – Civil Defence Institutional Unit
  • Artificial Intelligence Technology in Environmental Health
  • Industrial Psychology
  • Industrial Training

Career Prospects

Ministry of Housing and Local GovernmentPlantation Companies (e.g. KEJORA)Department of Orang Asli DevelopmentDistrict Health Offices

Future Education Pathways

→Certificate → Diploma in Environmental Health
→Diploma → Degree in Public Health
